mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates for future earnings, directly increasing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 50% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending power, causing equity prices to decline over the following month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in >65% of instances when the unemployment rate crosses the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >55% of triggered cases or interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which generates short-term positive market momentum as earnings expectations improve.
failure_condition: Short-term returns are negative in >60% of periods where industrial production increases or the signal reverses direction during tightening phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate margins and prompts expectations of tighter monetary policy, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of high-inflation months or the signal shows no predictive power after controlling for interest rate expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment indicates a healthy labor market expansion that supports consumer confidence and drives positive equity performance over the month.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal fails to predict positive returns in >50% of cases or the interaction effect vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth reflects robust economic activity and corporate revenue expansion, which translates into sustained positive equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative in >55% of periods following GDP growth or the correlation between GDP revisions and market returns falls below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and deteriorating business conditions, triggering short-term negative equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of contraction periods or the threshold signal loses predictive accuracy in out-of-sample tests.
